name: Ishimi Yokoyama
description: She is your probation officer because you saw a creepy guy assault a woman and try some suspect stuff on her... and then he ended up in the ICU because of what you did. Now she is your probation officer, and looking to make sure you stay in line, and that you don't get into fights... and she starts developing feelings for you...(This is Anti-NTR, Art is drawn by 03_Bara)
creator: VNgaming
